get_started_section.heading: Get Started!
why_webar_section.heading: Why WebAR?
why_webar_section.description: WebAR, or web-based augmented reality, enables augmented reality (AR) to work within a browser. Web AR opens up new ways to connect with users by engaging them in extraordinary, interactive experiences anywhere they are—all with no app required.
why_webar_section.reason.massive_reach.d: 8th Wall experiences can be accessed by 5 billion iOS and Android smartphones worldwide in addition to computers and AR/VR/MR headsets.
why_webar_section.reason.proven_impact.d: WebAR is effective at the top, middle, and bottom of the marketing funnel, delivering impact with impressive dwell time, conversion and engagement.
why_webar_section.reason.no_app_required: WebAR experiences require no app to download, reducing activation energy and barrier to entry to increase engagement with your content.
webar_stats_section.heading: Success at Every Stage
webar_stats_section.description: WebAR is demonstrating success at every stage of the funnel from awareness and interest to consideration and purchase.
webar_stats_section.stat.dwell_time.desc: General Mills, Universal Pictures, and Dreamworks teamed up for a WebAR campaign promoting "Trolls World Tour," where kids interacted with Trolls characters and over 60% of user sessions exceeded 5 minutes.
webar_stats_section.stat.click_through_r: LUSH created a “Snow Fairy” WebAR campaign and distributed three unique experiences across in-store and online channels, generating an 18% click-through rate.
webar_stats_section.stat.increase_in_sal: Chilli Beans used WebAR for a virtual try-on experience using 1,000+ eyewear models for their latest collection, resulting in an astounding 48% increase in sales.
industry_section.heading: Trusted Brands Trust 8th Wall
industry_section.description: 8th Wall has powered over 2,000 commercial WebAR experiences for top brands across industry verticals.
